feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,173Chapters: 2/365Kudos: 4

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new, short and sweet chapter focusing on the quiet,everyday moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this project for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: some version of you that I might not have (but I did not lose)
entry.summary:
Author: buckmeetsboy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,371Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: Buck’s hands were roughened and slightly reddened across the knuckles, like he’d been chopping wood or working outside without gloves. There was a fading bruise near his wrist, yellow at the edges. His eyes were bloodshot. There was an unevenness to the stubble along his jaw where he’d either stopped caring halfway through shaving or never started. All surface details. None of them what Eddie actually wanted to know.How bad is it today? How often do you hurt? What happens at three in the morning when the cabin gets too quiet and your head gets too loud. Do you still count the hours since the last pill or has that stopped meaning anything? When you said you needed space, did you mean from everyone or just from seeing what you’ve become reflected back in our faces?Buck shifted under the weight of the silence. “Say it.”Eddie frowned. “Say what?”“What you came all this way to say.”OR Buck leaves because he thinks he is a burden, Eddie follows.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: *Stars cannot be counted*
entry.summary:
Author: Romanancy7280

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 828Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 2

Summary: Buck always believed that luck could be saved up.Until it wasn’t enough anymore. After a loss that leaves him broken and unsure how to go on, Buck withdraws from everything… including himself. He stops eating, sleeping, and talking. He shuts down. But he isn’t as alone as he thinks. Eddie isn’t leaving.Maddie won’t let go.118 is waiting. Between relapses, guilt, and small steps forward, Buck will have to learn to stay—and to let someone else hold him when he can no longer hold himself.

entry.title: Take My Breath Away
entry.summary:
Author: TheGreenestBean

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,860Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 36

Summary: Eddie knew that there was something up with Buck, he could always tell when something was wrong with his best friend, because even after only a year Eddie was certain he knew Buck better than he knew himself. And there was definitely something off about the other man. He tried to keep a close eye on him, always glancing over at him when he wasn’t stuck to his hip, wanting to make sure he was okay. After everything he’d been through, Buck had to be okay. At some point Buck had begun coughing, little closed mouthed coughs, like he was trying to hide them, but of course Eddie noticed, so he upped his surveillance. And then the cough got worse, and worse, and worse, until Buck was staggering back and then collapsed to the floor. or After passing his recertification test Buck suffers from a pulmonary embolism, and it only gets worse from there.

entry.title: But you know that you're needing it, And you know that you need it bad
entry.summary:
Author: Jason_Todds_Thigh_Holster

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,462Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 74

Summary: ''What are the facts here, Buck? Tell me them! Because you should know that none of this, absolutely none of the fucked up shit you tell yourself is true. Not even the slightest bit,'' ''It's facts that you want?'' ''You know I do,'' ''Fine, Eds. Here they are, we both know I should be in that coffin six-feet under instead of Bobby,'' ''You didn't..'' Didn't what? Didn't just say that? No, Eddie couldn't ask that because he knows too well that Buck had said it. ''I need you to repeat that, what did you just say, Buck?'' Eddie swallows. He wants to weep, to cry. Cry until there's nothing left. His eyes burn, but he has nothing else to give. He's broken from his spiraling thoughts finding that Buck still hasn't responded. ''No,'' Eddie bleats. ''No, you can't - you cannot say something like that, Buck, don't..'' ''It should've been me, Eddie. It always should've been me instead of Bobby,'' Buck insists, eyes squeezed shut. Willing the fresh gleam of tears to not cascade down the blonde's cheeks. ''And I'd reverse our roles instantly, I'd be the one in that coffin if it wasn't already nailed shut,''

entry.title: Because We're Together (Post Season 9B)
entry.summary:
Author: RavensCAT

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,135Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 122

Summary: What if Christopher smokes pot behind the bleachers of his school right after everything Buck went through? “Mr. Diaz?” the lady on the other side asks. “Uh… yeah?” Buck says with a slight cough.  “Your son’s been suspended for two days.” “What? Why?!” Buck exclaims. “What happened?”  “He was trying to skip class with his friends.” “And go where?” Buck demands.  “Behind the bleachers of the school field.” “Doing what?” He questions. “I don’t think I need to answer that.” “Tell me,” he demands. “Marijuana.” Buck exhales sharply. Eddie’s going to lose his shit when he finds out.

entry.title: snap, crackle, pop
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,076Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 265

Summary: "Hey," Buck says. Eddie doesn’t move, eyes focused eerily on the ceiling. "Ambulance is coming. Should be quick." "Great," Eddie says, and his voice is flat and far away and scraped raw and he still isn’t looking at Buck, he is looking at the ceiling, he has committed to the ceiling, he and the ceiling are in a relationship now and Buck is the other woman. "I'm really sorry." "It's fine." "It's—" Buck looks at Eddie's dick. He looks away from Eddie's dick. He looks at the wall again. "Eddie, it's purple." "I know it's purple." "I just want to make sure you know it's purple." "I can feel that it's purple, Buck." Right. Okay. That — that makes sense. Considering the purple dick is attached to Eddie, currently. He would know better than anyone. Buck is going to stop talking now. Or,A pet psychologist and a bartender walk into a bar...

entry.title: Unbroken
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,693Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 78

Summary: Evan Buckley was a donor baby, and when his job was done, when his brother survived, the Buckley's gave him away, leaving Evan bouncing through the foster system. Years later, he thought he had found his home, the love of his life in Liam Parks, only to realize he had traded one nightmare for another, this time suffering with isolation and abuse. Now, Evan is Buck. He works for the LAFD, and a single father fiercely protecting his daughter, Mila. Suddenly, Buck is pulled into the loud, loyal life of the 118, his dangerously attractive coworker Eddie, and a found family he never thought he was allowed to have. Just as the walls start to come down, and Buck started to feel safe. Buck's past starts catching up to him. Or, Buck had a rough childhood, and an even worse marriage full of abuse. He runs to Los Angeles with his daughter and he finds his place in the 118, and falls for his actual love of his life Eddie. He meets new people on the way that show him what love really is.

entry.title: it all breaks down, it always does (it all works out, it always does)
entry.summary:
Author: Elgney

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,642Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 1,617

Summary: “I have no idea what’s going on.” He was embarrassed at the whiny note in his voice, but he couldn’t swallow it away. “I mean, the last thing I remember, I was telling my parents that I was leaving Texas. And then all of the sudden I wake up and it’s like—” Like some stranger named Buck had infiltrated every corner of his life. That’s what it felt like. —— Amnesiac Eddie tries really hard to hate Buck. It doesn’t stick.

entry.title: i’m dancing with you (in a parallel universe)
entry.summary:
Author: AsperJasper

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,564Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

Summary: Something is wrong.Buck can’t shake the feeling.He isn’t sure what it is, because, surface level, things are better right now than they’ve been in nine days. Eddie is awake. He’s talking. He’s laughed a time or two.He’s a little confused, obviously. A little foggy. He says he has a killer headache, which makes sense for the head injury he sustained, but otherwise doesn’t seem like he’s feeling terrible. Buck knows from his own coma that it had only taken a few days for him to know logically, if not emotionally, that the things from his dream were never real.Eddie says he didn’t have a dream, though, and he’s still acting…funny.Buck is acting funny.His chair is further away from Eddie’s bed than it was yesterday when he sits back down, the last one left. The night shift. Only one visitor allowed between 9pm and 9am, and that’s Buck. Which is right. But he’s sitting too far away.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Leave Me Alone, Punk
entry.summary:
Author: MaskedmenMaruaders

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,486Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 38

Summary: "Buck." Eddie repeated, shocked by how easily it rolled off his tongue. "Strange name." "Y- Yeah, I get that a lot." "Suits you." Buck's eyes widened in surprise and Eddie swore he heard his breath hitch. "Thanks." Buck mumbled, rubbing the back of his neck as blush crept in. "But I should go- Class and all that. Uh, enjoy. Or don't. I gotta go." Eddie watched him leave, standing in the same spot he'd first seen Buck and left with more questions than answers. OR Buddie age gap fic.

entry.title: Shoot Your Shot
entry.summary:
Author: em_likes_poetry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,179Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 15

Summary: Buck ran away from home, and learned pool from people he met as he travelled the world. Eddie learned from his dad, and vowed not to play again... until he moved to LA. What happens when two pool hustlers start working in the same fire station, and both are hiding their ability from everyone they know, including each other?

Author: peppermint_twist

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,428Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 69

Summary: Eddie closed the app, stared at the dark screen for a moment, then looked over at Buck. It seemed ridiculous. Juvenile, even. But the more Eddie turned it over, the more it made sense in a weird way. Buck needed to let go. Eddie's chest tightened with a mix of nerves and determination. If he was going to do this, he wasn't going to half-ass it. Or: Eddie edges Buck

entry.title: only fools are satisfied
entry.summary:
Author: windmillsofmymind

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,728Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 84

Summary: “I think maybe Pepa's setting you up with the wrong people,” Buck blurts out. “I did like him, he just–” “I mean–” Buck huffs, and then he really gets going, “he’s basically just some–some emotionally unavailable douche who dragged you all the way out to Studio City fully intending to ditch you until he realized he had a chance to get in your pants, which–where, in some restroom? And don’t even get me started on–like, you said you sucked his dick, but what about you? Did he even get you off? That doesn’t sound very considerate! Frankly, he sounds like a terrible guy, and you should let me set you up with someone!” Eddie’s brain isn’t going remotely as fast as Buck’s, because he’s still slowly making his way from his first thought (did I ever tell him I was meeting Matt in Studio City?) to his second one (has he been thinking about if and how I got off this whole time?) when Buck says that last part, and then it takes another moment to sink in. He blinks at the table. He blinks at Buck. “I’m sorry, what was that?”Or: Eddie comes out, Pepa takes the initiative, and Buck follows her lead.

Author: nineinchdove

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,816Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 110

Summary: He thinks of how long it is. The girth. The way there’s a hook to it, which never fails to press into that sweet spot deep inside Buck. He thinks of the way Eddie likes to push the pad of his thumb down on his clit, call it his tiny little dick and just keep it there as if he were cutting off the circulation of an actual penis so it couldn’t cum. He imagines Eddie’s voice, calling him a good boy. Praising him for taking his cock so good, huge, warm hands tweaking at Buck’s puffy nipples. Buck fantasizes about an empty grocery store, his hands plastered on the lip of the shelf in front of him, pants pulled at his ankles. Eddie on his knees behind him, face buried in his cunt from behind. His tongue slipping in deep, curling the way Buck likes, and— "Excuse me,” a woman says from beside him, pulling Buck from his head. “Are you alright? You’ve been staring at those eggs for like five minutes. I kind of need to get through.”DAY FOUR: Buckpussy + Second Trimester Hormones
